title: Agent Engineer Meme Cover
brief: A funny meme-style illustration for a WeChat article. Shows a female singer (stylized, not realistic) standing on stage with one hand pointing up at a glowing moon, while the other hand holds a microphone. Above her head floats a holographic HUD display showing system metrics: 'CPU: 99%', 'Memory: 3 Octaves', 'Latency: 0ms', 'Status: PROD READY'. The background is dark with neon green and orange tech elements mixed with traditional Chinese clouds and moon. Style should be like a tech company internal presentation slide that went viral - dead serious but obviously ridiculous. Clean, modern, slightly absurd. Title area at bottom should be clean.
prompt:
Create a polished article illustration titled 'Agent Engineer Meme Cover'. Diagram type: architecture diagram. Use a flat technical infographic illustration, clean grouped modules, clear arrows, soft professional palette, concise bilingual labels, document-friendly composition. Make it suitable for insertion into engineering notes or a design document. Prefer a clear information hierarchy with section titles, concise Chinese/English labels, short notes, arrows, grouped modules, and strong readability. Avoid dense paragraph blocks. Language mode: zh-en. Target aspect ratio preset: wechat-cover-hd. Mode: text-only. Content brief:
